description: Gravitational interactions near a planetary surface including weight and gravitational potential energy.

variable_sub.name: Mass
variable_sub.description: A physical quantity representing the amount of matter in an object.

variable_sub.name: Gravitational acceleration
variable_sub.description: The acceleration caused by gravity near the surface of a planet.

variable_sub.name: Weight
variable_sub.description: The gravitational force acting on an object.

variable_sub.name: Height
variable_sub.description: The vertical distance from a chosen reference level.

variable_sub.name: Gravitational Potential Energy
variable_sub.description: The potential energy associated with an object's position in a gravitational field.
